textByHash.6529fed2eb8ab2914bc90468dfff10ef5ba40316: Hello. What can I do for you?
textByHash.55962ca79749fa2ce99c362affdddfaa026b0907: I'm afraid not. All the recent chaos has caused a lot of supply issues. It will be a long time before things are properly back to normal.
textByHash.a76c55e5e89375362422f3829e026cecebf09609: Do you want to buy any stone for building? Or gold leaf?
textByHash.4ee9ca37b18a32f97f4cc71cc9c153a887374b03: A few kinds. Limestone, of course. Here in Keldagrim we're surrounded by the stuff so I can practically give it away! You'll be able to build some kinds of furniture out of that.
textByHash.4828b3d6544d64979bcf8060c92488bc06d275e6: Marble is much better, of course, but it costs a lot for me to get hold of it. You can make some beautiful pieces of furniture out of that.
textByHash.aca1465a3664dd766527abf765c65722d0e5a693: I also sell gold leaf, which can be used to decorate furniture made of marble or mahogany.
textByHash.8c95e04bec644a9dfa88ae88b0203f97201cffb8: Then for the very special furniture I sell these magic stones. Only the most skilled builders can work them, but they can create a few amazing pieces of furniture with them.
textByHash.dc73486b18ede87db08b85db90257e92d4b92273: So, do you want to buy anything?
